candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line at the same level as Cost of Goods Sold, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales related. Using it for COGS_DA would risk assigning company-wide operating D&A to COGS and double counting/misclassification.
More granular D&A component under the broader D&A disclosure; not specifically tied to COGS and should not be used for COGS_DA when no COGS-specific label is shown.
Granular amortisation component, not COGS-specific and subordinate to the broader D&A disclosure.
Granular depreciation component, not COGS-specific and subordinate to the broader D&A disclosure.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is visible. The generic operating D&A line should not be assigned to COGS_DA because it is not clearly a cost-of-sales sub-bucket relative to the selected parent row 'Cost of Goods Sold'.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A line shown alongside the selected overhead rows 'Employee beneft expenses' and 'Other Operating Expenses'. Since the earlier XSGA selection explicitly excluded depreciation/amortization and no SG&A subtotal already embedding it was selected, this summary D&A row should be added separately to the overhead bucket.
Component of the broader D&A disclosure. Not preferred because a higher-level summary D&A row exists, so using components would risk double counting.
Component of the broader D&A disclosure. Not preferred because a higher-level summary D&A row exists.
Component of the broader D&A disclosure. Not preferred because a higher-level summary D&A row exists.

variables.notes: Manually Changed. The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket consists only of 'Employee beneft expenses' and 'Other Operating Expenses', and the prior notes explicitly said depreciation/amortization was excluded there. A separate operating D&A summary row is visible above EBIT, so it should be added separately. Component D&A rows are not selected because the summary row avoids double counting.
